---
title: "Grace Delacroix"
output: distill::distill_article
---

<img src="photo.jpg" style="border-radius: 50%; width: 150px; height: 150px; object-fit: cover; float: left; margin-right: 20px; margin-bottom: 10px;">

Hi! My name is Grace, and I studied Bsc Politics and International Relations at the University of Essex. My academic interests focus on quantitative political analysis, policy research, and political economy. Here you can find some projects I have worked on!

<div style="margin-top: 20px; margin-bottom: 20px; display: flex; gap: 10px; flex-wrap: wrap;">

<a href="https://github.com/gracedelacroix" target="_blank"
style="display:inline-block; padding:10px 18px;
background:#24292e; color:#fff; border-radius:8px;
font-weight:500; text-decoration:none;">
GitHub
</a>

<a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/grace-delacroix?originalSubdomain=uk" target="_blank"
style="display:inline-block; padding:10px 18px;
background:#0A66C2; color:#fff; border-radius:8px;
font-weight:500; text-decoration:none;">
LinkedIn
</a>

<a href="mailto:gdelacroix10@gmail.com"
style="display:inline-block; padding:10px 18px;
background:#555; color:#fff; border-radius:8px;
font-weight:500; text-decoration:none;">
Email
</a>

</div>

[View all projects](projects.html)
